target: locked area-anchored T(t) (basin area mean, ug/m3)
pedigree: Recipe validated at Medellin against 15-22 withheld stations (F-M2 backtest: forecast RMSE 5.04 vs 24h-persistence 6.49, skill +0.22; live self-checking scoreboard running since 2026-07). Kandy has no public in-basin station, so this forecast is shown with that pedigree and NO local self-check.
regional_note: The three Sri Lankan stations logged alongside are 25-40 km outside the basin. They sample the regional/transboundary background (~76% of Kandy PM2.5, f_local=0.24), so they are context for B(t) — not a check on the Kandy field.
driver_note: Drivers from the NASA GMAO CFAPI forecast (keyless): chm v1 PM25 -> c_prior, met x1 U/V/T/ZPBL; mean of the two 0.25 deg cells covering the basin.
